title: AiExtraction
description: Structured output produced by the LLM (or rules-based fallback) for a single HSE incident report.

classification.description: Incident category according to HSE taxonomy

severity.description: Assessed risk level of the incident

equipment.description: Primary equipment involved (use 'Unknown' when not determinable)

location.description: Physical location or area where the incident occurred (use 'Unknown' when not determinable)

injuryType.description: Nature of injury or health impact (use 'None' when no injury occurred)

probableRootCause.description: Most likely root cause inferred from the report narrative

summary.description: Concise operational summary of the incident (max 500 characters)

tags.description: Short classification tags for filtering and grouping (e.g. slip-trip-fall, gas-detection)

examples.summary: Gas detector alarm triggered at compressor station C2. Area isolated, no injury.
